summary: ClashSolverAssessInterferenceOfBoundingBoxesCommand — PDF "ASSESS_INTERFERENCE". Pairwise BB overlap between two elements.
usecase: Pre/post-move interference check driven by a resolver step.
notfor: Running a full category-pair clash pass — that's ClashFinderRunByFilterPairsWithTolerancesCommand.
precondition: Active document; uidA + uidB resolvers or exactly two selected elements.
logictree:
1) Resolve pair — Resolver_UidA + Resolver_UidB if Bot; else the two currently selected elements (Human).
2) WireError if pair cannot be resolved or they are the same element.
3) Read BoundingBoxXYZ of each via Element.get_BoundingBox(null); WireError if either is null.
4) Call CheckBoundingBoxOverlap.AxisAligned(bbA, bbB, tolerance_mm) by default,
   or OrientedSat(bbA, Transform.Identity, bbB, Transform.Identity, tolerance_mm) if Resolver_UseSat.
5) Emit { overlaps, volume_mm3, reason, tolerance_mm, uidA, uidB, mode }.
6) Human path: TaskDialog with the same fields.

preprompts: Assessing bounding-box interference for the pair…
